articles.title: Ethereum Layer-2 Activity Hits A New High Amid Vitalik’s 3000ETH Transfer
articles.description: The co-founder of Ethereum, Vitalik Buterin transferred 3,000 ETH, approximately $8 million to a multi-sig wallet.
